-def evaluate_head(head, feats, labels, criterion, device):

         class_logits, domain_logits = head(feats_d, grl_lambda=0.0)

         cls_loss = cls_criterion(class_logits, labels_d)

         dom_loss = dom_criterion(domain_logits, locs_d)

-        loss = (cls_loss + 0.1 * dom_loss).item()

         y_true = labels.numpy()

         acc = float((pred == y_true).mean())

         f1 = float(macro_f1_present_classes(y_true, pred))

+        loss = float(cls_loss.item() + dom_loss.item())

     return loss, acc, f1

-def make_balanced_weights(labels, num_classes, beta=0.9999):

-    counts = torch.bincount(labels, minlength=num_classes).float()

-    effective_num = 1.0 - torch.pow(torch.tensor(beta), counts)

-    weights = (1.0 - beta) / torch.clamp(effective_num, min=1e-8)

-    weights[counts == 0] = 0.0

-    weights = weights / torch.clamp(weights.sum(), min=1e-8) * num_classes

-    return weights

+    class_counts = torch.bincount(train_labels, minlength=num_classes).float()

+    sample_weights = class_weights[train_labels]

+
